title: cyclosorus boydiae
intro: Cyclosorus boydiae, also known as the boy's spleen fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Cyclosorus boydiae have been associated with health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its health benefits.
